name: Understand PayPal Error Messages
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto provides appropriate error messages for each of these failures to help your buyers understand what's causing them."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The following table discusses the PayPal payment failures scenarios, the error messages that are displayed in case of those failures, and other relevant information:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Payment Method: PayPal Checkout"}], "data-id": "payment-method-paypal-checkout"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Payment Method: PayPal Cards"}], "data-id": "payment-method-paypal-cards"}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Displayed On"}], "data-id": "displayed-on"}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Error Scenario"}], "data-id": "error-scenario"}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Error Message"}], "data-id": "error-message"}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Transaction Status"}], "data-id": "transaction-status"}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "One or more product\u00a0stock has changed after the payment was initiated and therefore,\u00a0there's not enough stock to fulfill the order."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sorry, we don't have enough '["}, {"text": "ProductName", "italic": true}, {"text": "]' in stock to fulfill your order: we have\u00a00\u00a0available. Please change the quantity on ["}, {"text": "Quantity", "italic": true}, {"text": "] in your shopping cart and click update. Then try to checkout again."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voided"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The product price\u00a0changed after the payment was initiated."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sorry, there was an error processing your PayPal payment. Please try again or call during business hours for assistance."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voided"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Amount mismatch detected between Neto order grand total and the PayPal payment total. Many unknown scenarios can lead to such amount discrepancy."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sorry, there was an error processing your PayPal payment. Please try again or call during business hours for assistance."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voided"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Payment intent was created in PayPal but for unknown reasons, the\u00a0transaction details could not be captured at the end of checkout."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sorry, there was an error processing your PayPal payment. Please try again or call during business hours for assistance."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voided"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "My Account page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The currency type with which the order was placed is different from the current currency type."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Currency is not supported by the selected payment method."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voided"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "My Account page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The store currency was changed in the merchant\u2019s Control Panel, but not on the payment method configuration page."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We are sorry, but the payment could not be processed. Please try again or change your payment method."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voided"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "My Account page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout is initiated and the payment is created in PayPal with Authorised status, but for an unknown reason, the payment capture failed."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We are sorry, but the payment could not be processed. Please try again or contact the seller."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voided"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Displayed On"}], "data-id": "displayed-on-1"}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Error Scenario"}], "data-id": "error-scenario-1"}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Error Message"}], "data-id": "error-message-1"}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Transaction Status"}], "data-id": "transaction-status-1"}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3DS authentication\u00a0failed and the buyer couldn't complete the transaction."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "3DS authentication failed! Please change the quantity on order in your shopping cart and click update. Then try to checkout again."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Voided"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout page"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Checkout is initiated and the payment is created in PayPal with Authorised status, but for an unknown reason, the payment capture failed."}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We are sorry, but your card could not be verified.
